research_history_boundary.claim: exact-policy mechanical freeze, not a globally pristine market holdout; 2024+ and live forward remain final generalization tests

novelty_boundary.economic_axis: a derivative-venue tail excursion rejected inside the completed perp bar while the cash venue does not validate the tail

source_contract.revision_boundary: exchange timestamps define semantic availability and hashes freeze this backfilled snapshot; live promotion requires forward parity
source_contract.missing_spot_policy: never impute; incomplete five-minute bucket is ineligible

five_minute_aggregation.required_rows: exactly five consecutive one-minute rows per venue
five_minute_aggregation.availability: after the fifth one-minute row closes at t+5m

causal_feature_contract.thresholds: strictly-prior q95 over the last 8,640 complete joint buckets; minimum 2,016 observations
causal_feature_contract.both_branches: reject bucket if long and short both fire

execution_contract.decision: after signal bucket t closes at t+5m
execution_contract.latency_health_gate: the immediately following joint spot/perp five-minute bucket must complete before entry; this is known at entry time
execution_contract.entry: next tradable perp open at t+15m (signal_position + 3), after the t+5m..t+10m latency bucket is fully observed
execution_contract.exit: scheduled perp open 12 five-minute bars after entry
execution_contract.cagr: full wall-clock split including idle cash
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM, favorable-before-adverse held OHLC, funding, entry/exit/hypothetical liquidation costs

controls.direction_flip: primary clock, opposite side; diagnostic-only and never a repair, replacement, or rejection gate
controls.spot_only_wick: identical wick/body logic on spot without perp anchor
controls.common_wick: perp tail q95 and >=6bp but spot wick >=0.5*perp wick
controls.basis_free_perp_wick: perp wick prior q95 and >=6bp with body rejection; no spot ratio
controls.one_bar_delayed_entry: primary side, entry one additional bar later at signal_position+4 (t+20m)
controls.stale_spot_1h: compare current perp wick with spot wick 12 bars earlier
controls.stale_spot_1d: compare current perp wick with spot wick 288 bars earlier
controls.mechanism_rejection_rule: reject POWR-12 if spot-only, common-wick, basis-free, or either stale-spot control independently passes every primary gate

rejection_contract: any support/performance/mechanism failure rejects POWR-12 without changing threshold, wick floor, spot ratio, latency, side, or hold
